checks.name: UAE PDPL – Data localisation
checks.description: Personal data processed in UAE must be stored and processed within UAE unless transfer is permitted.

checks.name: KSA PDPL – Data localisation
checks.description: Critical personal data must be stored and processed in KSA; cross-border transfer subject to NDMO approval.

checks.name: CBUAE – Financial data in UAE
checks.description: Regulated financial institutions must maintain core systems and customer data within UAE or approved jurisdictions.

checks.name: SAMA – Financial data in KSA
checks.description: Banking and insurance data must reside in KSA; cloud and outsourcing subject to SAMA approval.

checks.name: Cross-border transfer mechanisms
checks.description: Adequate transfer mechanisms (adequacy, SCCs, binding corporate rules) in place for permitted transfers.

checks.name: Data Protection Authority registration
checks.description: Registration with UAE DPA where required for controllers/processors.

checks.name: Retention limits aligned with law
checks.regulation: UAE PDPL / KSA PDPL / sector rules
checks.description: Retention periods defined and aligned with minimum/maximum under applicable law.

checks.name: Consent and lawful basis records
checks.description: Documented lawful basis and consent where required for processing.

checks.name: Data Protection Impact Assessments
checks.description: DPIAs conducted for high-risk processing and filed with regulator where required.

checks.name: Breach notification readiness
checks.description: Process to notify regulator and data subjects within required timelines.

checks.name: Processor binding agreements
checks.description: Contracts with processors imposing data protection and sovereignty obligations.

checks.name: Cloud and sovereign cloud use
checks.regulation: UAE / KSA government and sector guidance
checks.description: Use of in-country or approved sovereign cloud for sensitive/critical data.

checks.name: ADGM – Data in ADGM / UAE
checks.description: ADGM entities' data handling consistent with onshore UAE and ADGM rules.

checks.name: DFSA – DIFC data handling
checks.description: DIFC firms' data residency and processing in line with DFSA and UAE requirements.

checks.name: Free zone data localisation
checks.description: Free zone entity data stored and processed in line with UAE and zone requirements.
